best_bet.reason: The swell jumps up to 2 to 4 feet here, giving you more shape and energy in the water than further north, all under blue skies and with moderate rip current risk that's manageable if you know what to watch for.

counties.name: New Hanover County
counties.beaches: Wrightsville Beach · Carolina Beach · Kure Beach

counties.name: Brunswick County
counties.beaches: Oak Island · Holden Beach · Ocean Isle Beach · Sunset Beach
